prompt: Escalate the follow-up note to Ken Lay, the audit committee, and internal legal, preserve the written record, and pause any broad reassurance until the accounting questions are reviewed.
summary: Sherron escalates her Aug 22 follow-up to internal legal and requests immediate notification of Ken Lay and the Audit Committee; legal/audit instruct management to preserve all related records and to pause any broad reassurance or public statements until the accounting questions are reviewed.

messages.subject: Escalation: Follow-up on questions I raised to Ken Lay (Aug 22) — preserve record; hold public reassurance
messages.body_text:
Evelyn —

I'm escalating the follow-up note regarding the questions I raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22. Please:

- Notify Ken Lay and the Audit Committee immediately and include internal legal counsel.
- Preserve all documents, emails, backups, and related materials connected to these accounting questions (initiate a document hold).
- Pause any broad reassurances or public statements to employees, investors, analysts, or the press until the Audit Committee and legal have reviewed and cleared the accounting issues.

I am preserving my original note in this thread. Please confirm by return email whom you notify and the preservation steps you implement.

Sherron S. Watkins
messages.rationale: Escalates per instruction to involve Ken Lay, the Audit Committee, and internal legal; requests preservation of the written record and a pause on any broad reassurance pending review.

messages.subject: Re: Escalation re Aug 22 questions — hold on public statements; preserve records
messages.body_text:
.schuler —

We have received Sherron's escalation regarding the questions she raised with Ken Lay on Aug 22. Internal legal has been asked to notify Ken Lay and the Audit Committee.

Immediate instructions:

- Do not issue any broad reassurances or public statements about these accounting matters. Direct all external inquiries to internal legal.
- Preserve all relevant records (emails, files, backups). Confirm that a legal hold is in place and identify custodians.
- Await direction from the Audit Committee before responding to investors, analysts, or the press.

Please confirm compliance and provide a list of any communications you have had on this topic.
messages.rationale: Audit/legal confirmation of escalation; instructs management to implement preservation measures and to pause any broad reassurance while accounting questions are reviewed by the Audit Committee and counsel.

top_subjects: Re: Escalation re Aug 22 questions — hold on public statements; preserve records
